text:
Once upon a quiet town by a whispering river lived a boy named Finn. Every morning before school he would sneak out of his attic bedroom window to sit by the river. The sun hadn't fully risen yet, casting a soft golden glow over the water. Every bird was quiet, the only noise being the soft crumble of acorns rolling down the bank.

One day a strange-looking cat settled beside Finn. It had yellow eyes and ears like a bat. Finn named her Luna. Over time, they became the only ones awake on rainy mornings. They'd play chess in the grey light, or cuddle by the fire when the wind howled outside.

One afternoon Finn noticed a peculiar seed rolling towards him. It had an ethereal glow. He picked it up, and to his surprise it sang a song like no bird Finn had ever heard. "Come meet Luna," it said.

They went to a little hollow. There she was, sitting by a bright orange bloom. "I
